ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "mmsi" TEXT /* Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI) of the vessel */,
  "shiptype" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., GeneralCargo, Tanker) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number for unique identification of the vessel */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the vessel */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag state of the vessel */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year of construction of the vessel */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the vessel owner */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the vessel manager */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the vessel operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel the track is associated with */,
  "start_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track started */,
  "end_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track ended */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Location coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the track started */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Location coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the track ended */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered in the track in nautical miles */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the vessel during the track in knots */,
  "track_duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in hours */,
  "track_status" TEXT /* Status of the track (e.g., Ongoing, Completed, Abandoned) */,
  "start_port" TEXT /* Name of the port where the track started */,
  "end_port" TEXT /* Name of the port where the track ended */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Total fuel consumption during the track in liters */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Total cargo weight during the track in metric tons */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment within a track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track the segment is part of */,
  "segment_start_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment started */,
  "segment_end_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment ended */,
  "segment_start_location" TEXT /* Location coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the segment started */,
  "segment_end_location" TEXT /* Location coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the segment ended */,
  "segment_distance" REAL /* Distance covered in the segment in nautical miles */,
  "segment_average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the vessel during the segment in knots */,
  "segment_duration" REAL /* Duration of the segment in hours */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the segment in liters */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Cargo weight during the segment in metric tons */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the segment (e.g., clear, stormy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_segments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., PortCall, Refueling, Maintenance) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the event in hours */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the event in liters */,
  "cargo_activity" TEXT /* Activity related to cargo (e.g., loading, unloading) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_events_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cog_binning" (
  "cog_bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COG bin */,
  "cog_bin_range" TEXT /* Range of COG values in the bin */,
  "cog_bin_label" TEXT /* Label for the COG bin */,
  "bin_color" TEXT /* Color code for the COG bin for visualization purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cog_bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the daily segment (e.g., MORNING, AFTERNOON) */,
  "start_hour" INTEGER /* Start hour of the segment */,
  "end_hour" INTEGER /* End hour of the segment */,
  "bin_color" TEXT /* Color code for the daily segment for visualization purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hourly_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hourly activity record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "activity_count" INTEGER /* Number of AIS signals received for the vessel in that hour */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the vessel in that hour */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the vessel in that hour */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Total fuel consumption during the hour in liters */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Total cargo weight during the hour in metric tons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_activity_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maritime analyst, safety officer, logistics manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., vessel, track) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
